head: 410275f94
scope: Go-touching changes only (libs/atlas-seeder, tools/{catalog-lint,seed-splitters}, 8 migrated services)

checks.name: Goroutine carries tenant via bgCtx, not r.Context() post-response
No map mutation race under errgroup
No direct entity writes from HTTP handlers
Errors distinguished (500 vs 202)
checks.evidence: handlers.go:63 (500 on ReadStatus err), handlers.go:54 (202 async)

checks.name: Compile-time interface assertions
checks.evidence: var _ seeder.Subdomain[J,M] = X{} present in every subdomain file

checks.name: seed_state migration registered in every service
checks.evidence: all 8 main.go files include AutoMigrate(&seeder.SeedState{}) in database.SetMigrations

checks.name: RegisterRoutes wired with d.Logger(), db, src, Group
checks.evidence: 9 groups.go files matching the same shape

checks.name: Inline Seed POST handlers removed from resource.go
No os.Getenv in service-side subdomain files
checks.evidence: grep across services/*/atlas.com/**/subdomain*.go returns zero matches

checks.name: DeleteAllForTenant tenant-scoped
checks.evidence: either via RegisterTenantCallbacks GORM callback or explicit where tenant_id=?

checks.name: Dockerfile carries atlas-seeder in 4 placements
checks.evidence: grep -c atlas-seeder Dockerfile returns 4 for all 8 services

checks.name: No duplication of atlas-constants types
checks.evidence: no new domain types/constants; JSON shape uint32 fields are wire format

checks.name: Dockerfile 4-placement for atlas-seeder
checks.evidence: verified in services/atlas-drop-information/Dockerfile lines 14, 32, 49, 68 and identical pattern in 7 others

checks.name: Kafka topic naming
checks.evidence: no Kafka topic changes in scope

nonBlocking: Consider documenting the database.RegisterTenantCallbacks prerequisite in libs/atlas-seeder/README.md.
libs/atlas-seeder/catalog.go:74 Walk relies on os.ReadDir sort order; optional sort.Strings hardening.
